channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Agentic coding at enterprise scale demands spec-driven development
item.description: Presented by AWSAutonomous agents are compressing software delivery timelines from weeks to days. The enterprises that scale agents safely will be the ones that build using spec-driven development.There’s a moment in every technology shift where the early adopters stop being outliers and start being the baseline. We’re at that moment in software development, and most teams don’t realize it yet.A year ago, vibe coding went viral. Non-developers and junior developers discovered they could build beyond their abilities with AI. It lowered the floor. It made prototyping much quicker, but it also in...

item.title: More LG OLED TV users are experiencing power cycling issues caused by bright flashes — and it's not just older models
item.description: More LG OLED users are reporting power cycling issues caused by bright flashes on Reddit...

item.title: RED by SFR condamné à 10 millions d’euros d’amende pour ses fausses promesses de prix garantis « à vie »
item.description: C'est un feuilleton judiciaire qui connaît enfin un dénouement après deux plaintes et cinq ans de procédure. La justice vient de faire condamner RED by SFR à une lourde amende pour pratiques commerciales trompeuses. En cause : des forfaits au prix garanti à vie mais qui ont rapidement augmenté.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly building an AI clone to replace him in meetings
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg could soon have an AI clone of himself to interact with and provide feedback to employees, according to a report from the Financial Times. Sources tell the outlet that Meta is training the AI avatar on Zuckerberg's image and voice, along with his mannerisms, tone, and public statements, "so that employees […]

item.title: Telegram CEO urges Russians to 'stock up' on VPNs as the platform gets an anti-censorship boost
item.description: With Telegram connectivity in Russia dropping to just 5% last Friday, Pavel Durov has announced a major upgrade to the app's anti-censorship protocols. However, reliable VPNs remain a vital lifeline for users. Here's everything we know.

item.title: Un PDF suffit à pirater votre PC avec Acrobat Reader, Adobe réagit… 4 mois plus tard
item.description: Adobe a mis quatre mois à corriger une faille critique d'Acrobat Reader. Pendant ce temps, des attaquants l'exploitaient déjà pour voler vos données.

item.title: Ce chargeur rapide 100W pouvant accueillir jusqu’à 5 appareils simultanément est en promo à -30%, pratique pour les voyages
item.description: Le chargeur Ugreen Nexode 100W 5 ports est très pratique pour brancher plusieurs appareils en même temps, que vous pouvez retrouver pour 35,99 euros au lieu de 51,24 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Slate Auto raises $650M to fund its affordable EV truck plans
item.description: Slate Auto's latest funding round was led by existing investor TWG Global, a firm run by LA Dodgers owner Mark Walter.

item.title: La corbeille débarque dans Google Messages, voici comment l’utiliser
item.description: Terminées les conversations effacées par erreur sur Google Messages. L'application se dote d'une corbeille qui vous laisse le temps de les récupérer.

item.title: « La Terre est comme un canot de sauvetage flottant dans l’Univers » : les confidences émouvantes de l’équipage d’Artemis II
item.description: Au cours d’une conférence de presse, les astronautes Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch et Jeremy Hansen ont livré leurs premières impressions, encore marquées par l’émotion. Entre émerveillement, témoignages intenses et prise de conscience du lien qui les unit, leur retour met en...

item.title: Victime de son succès, le MacBook Neo force Apple à doubler sa production en urgence
item.description: Le MacBook « low-cost » d'Apple s'arrache comme des petits pains. Face à une rupture de stock sur le modèle d'entrée de gamme, la firme de Cupertino vient de revoir drastiquement ses objectifs de production à la hausse. Mais ce triomphe commercial cache un véritable casse-tête logistique pour le géant américain.

item.title: Avec cet accessoire, le Find X9 Ultra va éteindre la concurrence en matière de zoom
item.description: Oppo a dévoilé son Hasselblad Earth Explorer Master Set. Ce pack d’accessoires, inspiré par l’univers de la photographie argentique, accompagnera la sortie du Find X9 Ultra.

item.title: Surfshark just dropped its best deal of the year — plans start from less than $50 for 28 months protection
item.description: An exclusive way to access Surfshark's best-ever price

item.title: No, cracked versions of Resident Evil Requiem aren't performing better than the official game — but there are still issues with DRM
item.description: Concerns have been widespread about Capcom's Resident Evil Requiem performing better via pirated versions, but that's not the case.

item.title: ‘You’re effed’: Palantir CEO says AI ‘will destroy humanities jobs’ – but Gen Z workers are apparently deliberately sabotaging AI rollouts in an effort to fight back
item.description: AI CEOs say that many entry level jobs won't exist in the future, and Gen Z has taken it personally.

item.title: Meta is reportedly building an AI clone of Mark Zuckerberg
item.description: Picture this: You're a senior Meta employee looking for feedback from the CEO. But, instead of hearing from the real Mark Zuckerberg, you get a response from a Zuckerberg AI character. As absurd as that sounds, it could eventually be a reality. Meta is reportedly working on such an AI character, training it on Zuckerberg's mannerisms, tone and publicly available statements, according to the Financial Times. The character is also learning about the CEO's thoughts on recent company strategy, with the idea that it could offer advice to Meta employees. The company has reportedly, for some time, ...

item.title: De l’oxygène sur la Lune : cette technologie de Blue Origin pourrait changer la conquête spatiale
item.description: Blue Origin, l'entreprise spatiale de Jeff Bezos, aurait mis au point un réacteur capable d’extraire l’oxygène contenu dans la poussière lunaire. Cette technologie permettrait par ailleurs la production de carburant de fusée et l’exploitation de matériaux. Il pourrait s’agir d’une révolution pour la conquête spatiale.

item.title: The ‘Highlander’ Reboot Promises Plenty of Decapitations
item.description: Plus, Nicholas Hoult preps for 'Man of Tomorrow'.

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz blockade is causing a slow-moving food crisis
item.description: Farmers are very busy in the spring, under pressure to get crops into the ground just as the Northern Hemisphere begins to thaw. But this year has been different for many, thanks in large part to the escalating war in Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The Strait of Hormuz is a […]

item.title: What is the release date for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episode 5 on Disney+?
item.description: Titled 'The Grand Design', here's when the next episode of Daredevil: Born Again season 2 will air.

item.title: Pope Leo pushes back against Trump in feud over Iran war saying he’s ‘not afraid’
item.description: Trump blasted U.S.-born Pope Leo XIV in a social media post. U.S.-born Pope Leo XIV pushed back Monday on President Donald Trump’s broadside against him over the U.S.-Israel war in Iran, telling reporters that the Vatican’s appeals for peace and reconciliation are rooted in the Gospel, and that he doesn’t fear the Trump administration.“To put my message on the same plane as what the president has attempted to do here, I think is not understanding what the message of the Gospel is,” Leo told The Associated Press aboard the papal plane en route to Algeria. “And I’m sorry to hear that but I will...

item.title: Google Pixel voicemail finally lets you record custom greetings in a new beta
item.description: Take a Message is finally replacing the Google Assistant greeting with custom ones in the latest beta.

item.title: Quelle montre connectée Garmin choisir ? Notre sélection des meilleurs modèles de 2026
item.description: Si vous êtes à la recherche d'une excellente smartwatch pour vous accompagner pendant vos séances de sport, la marque Garmin est la référence. Nous avons détaillé les gammes du constructeur et sélectionné les meilleures montres Garmin.

item.title: Apple dit oui aux eGPU sur Mac : une petite révolution pour l’IA, pas pour le gaming
item.description: Apple a enterré le Mac Pro fin mars. Deux semaines plus tard, un studio de Hong Kong offre aux Mac ce qu'Apple leur refusait depuis six ans. Un GPU externe, enfin.

item.title: Windows 11 bouscule ses paramètres de stockage et supprime une limitation vieille de 30 ans
item.description: Microsoft teste dans la dernière build Insider de Windows 11plusieurs améliorations et changements pour son système de stockage. Outre de meilleures performances au sein des paramètres de stockage, la firme de Redmond met fin à 30 ans de limitation pour le formatage en FAT32.

item.title: Amazon brade à -30 % son pack de 2 Ring Outdoor Camera Pro qui filment en 4K
item.description: La récente caméra de surveillance extérieure Ring Outdoor Camera Pro filme en 4K, détecte chaque mouvement devant votre domicile et résiste évidemment aux intempéries. Actuellement, vous en trouverez deux dans un pack à 279,99 euros au lieu de 399,98 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Tap to Share will soon bring some AirDrop-like features to Android, and it’s just been shown off
item.description: Tap to Share is set to let Android users share contact information and files by overlapping their phones.

item.title: Roblox introduces mandatory age-gated account tiers
item.description: Roblox is preparing to roll out its biggest change since starting age verification late last year. While that program was initially focused on chat access, today’s news is about age-segregating the games on the massive platform. Starting in mid-May, users will be pushed into one of three worlds: Roblox Kids, Roblox Select or Roblox. The exact age ranges of these groups will vary by territory, but in the US they are 5-8 for Kids, 9-15 for Select and 16+ for the regular account. These three account types then align with the platform’s current content maturity labels, which divide games into Mini...

item.title: Roblox will need age verification to make sure you’re at least 9 years old
item.description: Roblox is about to make a big change to how you can access games on its platform: If you want to play any game that's intended for users nine or older, you will have to complete an age verification process. The shift is happening as part of a rollout of new Roblox Kids and Roblox […]

item.title: Roblox has games again
item.description: Roblox is making a subtle but notable change. After swapping the word "game" for "experience" all over its website and mobile apps in 2021 while the Epic Games v. Apple trial was taking place, Roblox is getting more comfortable with using the term "games" once again. "Over time, we've learned that 'experiences' isn't an intuitive […]

item.title: Roblox introduces ‘Kids’ and ‘Select’ accounts for age-appropriate access to games and chat
item.description: Users aged five to nine will be assigned to a "Roblox Kids" account, and users aged nine to 15 to will be put in a "Roblox Select" account.

item.title: Roblox plans new age-based accounts for child safety
item.description: After criticism over kids’ safety issues, the platform is rolling out new account types limiting game and chat access based on age. Roblox is updating its child protection features again, rolling out restricted Kids accounts for users ages 5 through 8 and Roblox Select accounts for users 9 through 15, both with parental controls and other age-based restrictions. ...

item.title: Smartphones : dans un marché en chute libre, seules deux marques résistent à la tempête
item.description: Le marché mondial des smartphones a chuté de 6% au premier trimestre 2026, avec Apple et Samsung dominant à eux deux 41% du marché. Apple a gagné des parts de marché avec 21% grâce à l'iPhone 17, tandis que Samsung stagne à 20% mais subit une baisse de volumes. Des marques comme Google et Nothing progressent hors du Top 5, mais la majorité des acteurs secondaires souffrent dans un marché en contraction....

item.title: ‘Daemons of the Shadow Realm’ Has Four Banger Songs For the Price of Two
item.description: Japanese artists Vaundy and Yama bring their musical talents to 'Daemons of the Shadow Realm' and play on the show's duality.

item.title: Netflix is about to lose 'one of the most fantastic crime-thrillers of modern times' — and fans of Jo Nesbo's Detective Hole need to stream it ASAP
item.description: Loved Jo Nesbo's Detective Hole? The grisly adaptation that started it all is leaving Netflix this week — so catch it while you can.

item.title: New uses for traditional crops are increasing value per acre
item.description: The value of crops extends beyond food to industrial materials, energy applications, and personal care products. There is a persistent belief that food, fuel, and industrial uses compete for the same bushel. In practice, the opposite is increasingly true.

item.title: ‘Going too far without user consent’: Mozilla blasts Microsoft’s AI creep as user backlash forces Copilot to be scaled back
item.description: Mozilla chides Microsoft for forcing its Copilot AI into apps and says Firefox works very differently.
